subject: (no subject)
body:
Thank you..
In regards to Jack Goldberger getting to Vail on the 20th:
Air Ghislaine has 68 hours left on the account.  They fly into Eagle airport, not Vail, but it's close. They only operate during the day; nothing after dark, so Jack couldn't leave at night. What should I suggest to him? See if he can get whatever commercial flight he had a day later?

-----Original Message-----
>From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
>Sent: Feb 16, 2008 11:06 AM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: Re:
>
>yes
>
>----- Original Message ----
>From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>

>Swantile, who I'm ordering my kitchen cabinets from are asking for the quote to be approved today before my sales person goes on vacation tomorrow so they can get the order started. I wanted to make sure I have your approval for the final numbers before I sign off on them. 
>
>For the kitchen cabinets, sink, and countertop/backsplash: $17,025.72.
>For the bathroom vanity, countertop, toilet and medicine cabinet: $2,328
>
>Is this OK?
body_html:
Thank you..
In regards to Jack Goldberger getting to Vail on the 20th:
Air Ghislaine has 68 hours left on the account. They fly into Eagle airport, not Vail, but it's close. They only operate during the day; nothing after dark, so Jack couldn't leave at night. What should I suggest to him? See if he can get whatever commercial flight he had a day later?

-----Original Message-----

From: "J. Epstein" jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Feb 16, 2008 11:06 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: Re:

yes

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" kellens@earthlink.net
To: J. Epstein jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, February 16, 2008 10:53:51 AM
Subject:

Swantile, who I'm ordering my kitchen cabinets from are asking for the quote to be approved today before my sales person goes on vacation tomorrow so they can get the order started. I wanted to make sure I have your approval for the final numbers before I sign off on them.

For the kitchen cabinets, sink, and countertop/backsplash: $17,025.72.
For the bathroom vanity, countertop, toilet and medicine cabinet: $2,328

Is this OK?
